name: Great Western Mining Corporation PLC
summary: Great Western Mining Corporation PLC engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties in the United States, the Republic of Ireland, and the United Kingdom. The company explores for copper, silver, gold, and other minerals. It primarily holds interests in 248 full and 5 fractional claims covering an area of approximately 21 square kilometers in Black Mountain Claim Group; 119 full and 12 fractional claims covering an area of approximately 10 square kilometers in Huntoon Claim Group; and 313 claims covering an area of approximately 26.14 square kilometers in Golconda Fault Line Claims located in Nevada. Great Western Mining Corporation PLC was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Dublin, Ireland.
